The '''''Twilight Sailer''''' was [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]].

It was similar to [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the Hutt's sail barge [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], but manufactured by [[Eleaor Propulsion]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]] {{1st}}

*<!-- 1996-11-XX -->''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
